docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY TSENG, WEI-YU AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSENG, WEI-YU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC PLAINTIFF'S HOUSEHOLD HAS BEEN COMPENSATED. THIS PLAINTIFF DID NOT MAKE ANY COMPLAINT HIMSELF UNTIL AFTER DEFENDANT TOOK ACTIONS TO REMEDY THE ISSUES. WHILE PLAINTIFF COMPLAINS HIS PACKAGE WAS STOLEN, HE DID NOT COOPERATE TO FIND THE THIEF AND HE WAS COMPENSATED BY VENDOR. DEFENDANT IS EVICTING THE SMOKER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BREHYONNIA HAYNES REEVES FILED BY DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF WEI-YU TSENG IS PRESENT, WITH WITNESS RICH LEE. DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BREHYONNIA HAYNES REEVES, COMMUNITY MANAGER. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2026 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSENG, WEI-YU AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-25-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC
